title: position/limit Option<u64> sends null not absent in /query calls
description: chat_query and message_query pass position/limit as Option<u64> into serde_json::json!(), which serializes None as JSON null. RFC 8620 §5.5 defines position as UnsignedInt (not UnsignedInt|null) with default 0, and limit as UnsignedInt. Sending null for these fields is non-conformant; a strict server SHOULD return invalidArguments. The fix is to omit null fields using skip_serializing_if or by building the JSON object conditionally. Affected: methods/chat.rs lines 48-53, methods/message.rs lines 73-80. The wiremock integration tests do not validate outgoing request bodies so this bug is not caught by the current test suite.
